data.content: [Claude implementation 2026-04-02] Implementation complete on branch worktree-knots-c8f4 at d31e3f00b082. Added ArtifactTarget enum (8 variants) in src/artifact_target.rs with FromStr validation. Updated legacy_outputs() to use ArtifactTarget mapping. Added validation warnings in TOML and JSON bundle parsers. 4 unit tests in artifact_target_tests.rs. All 837 tests pass, 95.40% coverage. 149 lines added across 6 files. No .loom file changes, no prompt template changes.
